name: Waving Hand
desc: A hand waving hello or goodbye.

name: Raised Back of Hand
desc: A hand raised with the back facing the viewer.

name: Hand with Fingers Splayed
desc: An open hand showing five fingers spread apart.

name: Raised Hand
desc: A flat hand raised up, often meaning stop or a high-five.

name: Vulcan Salute
desc: A hand gesture with a gap between the middle and ring fingers.

name: OK Hand
desc: A gesture making a circle with the thumb and index finger.

name: Pinched Fingers
desc: An Italian-style gesture showing fingers held together pointing upward.

name: Victory Hand
desc: The peace sign or V for victory gesture.

name: Crossed Fingers
desc: Index and middle fingers crossed for good luck.

name: Love-You Gesture
desc: The American Sign Language gesture for 'I love you'.

name: Sign of the Horns
desc: A rock and roll gesture with index and pinky fingers raised.

name: Call Me Hand
desc: Thumb and pinky finger extended, resembling a phone.

name: Backhand Index Pointing Left
desc: An index finger pointing to the left.

name: Backhand Index Pointing Right
desc: An index finger pointing to the right.

name: Backhand Index Pointing Up
desc: An index finger pointing straight up from the back of the hand.

name: Middle Finger
desc: The middle finger raised in a rude or insulting gesture.

name: Backhand Index Pointing Down
desc: An index finger pointing straight down.

name: Index Pointing Up
desc: The front of the hand with the index finger pointing up.

name: Thumbs Up
desc: A closed fist with the thumb pointing upward in approval.

name: Thumbs Down
desc: A closed fist with the thumb pointing downward in disapproval.

name: Raised Fist
desc: A clenched fist held high, symbolizing solidarity or power.

name: Oncoming Fist
desc: A fist pointed at the viewer, used for a fist bump.

name: Left-Facing Fist
desc: A clenched fist facing to the left.

name: Right-Facing Fist
desc: A clenched fist facing to the right.

name: Clapping Hands
desc: Two hands clapping together in applause.

name: Raising Hands
desc: Two open hands raised in celebration or praise.

name: Open Hands
desc: Two hands held open, representing openness or a hug.

name: Palms Up Together
desc: Two hands held together with palms up, as if in prayer or receiving.

name: Handshake
desc: Two hands shaking to show agreement or greeting.

name: Folded Hands
desc: Two palms pressed together, meaning please, thank you, or prayer.

name: Writing Hand
desc: A hand holding a pen or pencil, as if writing.

name: Nail Polish
desc: A hand with colored nail polish being applied.

name: Selfie
desc: An arm holding a smartphone to take a self-portrait.

name: Flexed Biceps
desc: A muscular arm flexing to show strength or effort.

name: Mechanical Arm
desc: A robotic or prosthetic arm.

name: Mechanical Leg
desc: A robotic or prosthetic leg.

name: Leg
desc: A human leg from the hip down.

name: Foot
desc: A human foot, showing the toes and sole.

name: Ear
desc: A human ear, representing hearing or listening.

name: Ear with Hearing Aid
desc: A human ear with a small hearing device attached.

name: Nose
desc: A human nose, representing smell or sniffing.

name: Brain
desc: A pink, anatomical human brain.

name: Anatomical Heart
desc: A realistic human heart showing arteries and chambers.

name: Lungs
desc: A pair of human lungs for breathing.

name: Tooth
desc: A white human molar tooth.

name: Bone
desc: A generic white bone, like a femur.

name: Eyes
desc: A pair of eyes looking slightly to the side.

name: Eye

name: Tongue

name: Mouth
